channel.title: Azure.microsoft.com/En-Us/Blog on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Azure.microsoft.com/En-Us/Blog on .NET Ramblings

item.title: From commit to cloud: Powering what’s next for PostgreSQL
item.description: PostgreSQL has become foundational to how modern applications are built. It powers everything from early‑stage startups to some of the most demanding production systems in the world. Its longevity isn’t accidental, it’s the result of decades of engineering discipline, community collaboration, and a relentless focus on correctness and extensibility. The post From commit to cloud: Powering what’s next for PostgreSQL appeared first on Microsoft Azure Blog. Link to article: https://azure.microsoft.com/en-us/blog/from-commit-to-cloud-powering-whats-next-for-postgresql/
